case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. BLANCA ZORAIDA JAIMES RICO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BLANCA ZORAIDA JAIMES RICO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RICO, BLANCA ZORAIDA JAIMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
